name: deft
description: deft — Codex 개인 워크플로 도구 모음 (multi-check / multi-round / session-relocate / set·restore-statusline).

interface.longDescription: deft bundles bluehansl's personal Codex workflow skills under one namespace: multi-AI cross-check (multi-check), multi-round dialogue/debate (multi-round), session relocation (session-relocate), and status line set/restore (set-statusline / restore-statusline).
defaultPrompt: Run deft multi-check on this change.
Relocate this session to another project.
